goal: Fix populate semantic relationship output so actual .coderef/index.json and semantic-registry.json include imports and reverse usedBy from the canonical pipeline, and make optional source-header projection file-level, deduplicated, and CRLF-safe.
plan_type_rationale: Relationship propagation must land before projections and header behavior can be corrected safely.

phases.name: Phase 1 - Root Cause Confirmation and Contract Design
phases.description: Confirm the relationship propagation failure and define the additive PipelineState and ElementData projection contract.

tasks.description: Inspect PipelineOrchestrator, PipelineState, IndexGenerator, RegistryGenerator, semantic analyzer, populate CLI, and header generator to confirm relationship data flow.
Record the validated root cause and output contract in analysis/communication artifacts before implementation.
Gate implementation on the confirmed fact that imports are extracted but absent from generator-visible ElementData.

phases.name: Phase 2 - Pipeline Relationship Propagation
phases.description: Expose extracted imports and calls through PipelineState and enrich ElementData with normalized file-level imports before semantic projection.

tasks.description: Add imports and calls arrays to PipelineState and return allImports/allCalls from PipelineOrchestrator.run().
Create or reuse a helper that attaches normalized file-level imports to ElementData before buildSemanticRelationships().
Add focused tests proving actual generated index and semantic registry output contain imports and reverse usedBy for a small fixture.

phases.name: Phase 3 - Projection Output Alignment
phases.description: Ensure index.json and semantic-registry.json use the same enriched canonical ElementData and preserve relative POSIX paths and CodeRef IDs.

tasks.description: Refactor index and registry generators to share the same semantic enrichment path instead of rebuilding from raw state.elements independently.
Verify semantic-registry entries mirror canonical ElementData relationship fields and generated_from remains .coderef/index.json.
Run focused tests for CodeRef IDs, imports, usedBy, path normalization, and semantic registry projection.

phases.name: Phase 4 - Source Header Projection Repair
phases.description: Make optional source-header mode write one deduplicated header block per file and insert cleanly around existing comments and CRLF files.

tasks.description: Group semantic elements by file in populate --source-headers and generate one merged header projection per file.
Fix HeaderGenerator insertion to handle CRLF and maintain clean spacing after leading comments.
Add tests for existing JSDoc/license comments, CRLF files, and repeated element headers in the same file.

phases.name: Phase 5 - Fresh Clone Verification and Documentation
phases.description: Validate real populate output on a cloned repo and update docs/workorder notes with exact behavior and command usage.

tasks.description: Build the package and run populate-coderef --mode full against a fresh clone or isolated fixture.
Confirm actual output has nonzero imports and usedBy, semantic-registry mirrors index, default populate does not modify source, and source-header mode writes clean headers.
Update README/docs/CLI if user-visible behavior or source-header cautions changed.

hard_stops.reason: Root cause confirmation must be explicit before editing pipeline relationship contracts.
PipelineState relationship propagation must pass focused tests before projection output changes are trusted.
Index and semantic-registry projection alignment must be verified before header writes are repaired.
Source-header mode must be proven clean before real source mutation is advertised.
Fresh clone verification is required before closure because the prior focused tests missed real output gaps.

acceptance_criteria: .coderef/index.json from actual populate contains nonzero imports on relevant elements.
.coderef/index.json from actual populate contains nonzero reverse usedBy entries for internal imports.
.coderef/semantic-registry.json mirrors canonical relationship fields and reports generated_from as .coderef/index.json.
Default populate does not modify source files.
--source-headers writes one clean deduplicated block per file and handles CRLF/existing comments without malformed adjacency.
Focused tests and build pass; fresh-clone or isolated-fixture populate verification is recorded.
